encounter.reason: SNAP application assistance, food pantry enrollment confirmed
encounter.location: Rose City Community Services, 6530 SE 82nd Avenue, Portland, OR 97266

document_references.description: Community health worker telephone follow-up documenting completion of SNAP application submission to Oregon DHS with patient, confirmation of food pantry enrollment with first pickup scheduled April 5, 2026, and distribution of 10 TriMet HOP card transit vouchers for medical appointment transportation. Referral task remains in-progress pending SNAP approval determination.
